name: The Naming Ceremony
effect: Convene stakeholders to assign a name to the proof of concept. This card is considered aligned.

clauses.name: CONSENSUS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If all stakeholders agree on a name: The PoC is considered production-ready.

clauses.name: ACRONYM EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the name is abbreviated: The abbreviation is considered self-explanatory.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: Next quarter: The name is replaced without ceremony.

witness_quote: Can we just call it a platform?
